params.name: domains
params.description: Only include results for the specified domains. Use comma-separated string to include more than one domain. For example, `one.com,two.info,three.biz`

params.name: listingStatus
params.description: Only include results for the specified listing status.

params.name: transferBefore
params.description: Domain transfer time before this time, ISO 8601, in UTC. Defaults to last day of the previous month if not provided. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` listingStatus.

params.name: transferAfter
params.description: Domain transfer time after this time, ISO 8601, in UTC. Defaults to first day of the previous month if not provided. Applicable only for listings in `FULFILLED` listingStatus.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of items to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: domains
params.description: A comma separated list of domain names

info.name: Add expiry listings into GoDaddy Auction
